description: §21.3 — importing from `./m.scrml` with the sibling present (via the `files` convention) resolves on disk; E-IMPORT-006 stays silent.
rationale: §21.3: a relative import that resolves to a real sibling module is legal. m.scrml is written alongside the entry, so the path resolves and E-IMPORT-006 must not fire — the clean twin of the missing-file case.
